facts.statement: The ISS travels at 30,000 km/h in orbit
The ISS orbits Earth 5 times per day
The ISS currently has 10 crew members aboard
facts.actual: The ISS currently houses 7 crew members

facts.statement: Oleg Kononenko, the record holder for longest time in space, has accumulated over 1,500 days aboard the ISS
facts.actual: Kononenko accumulated nearly 1,111 days in space across five missions

facts.statement: The ISS has internet speeds of 100 Mbit/s
facts.actual: NASA upgraded the ISS internet to 600 Mbit/s in 2019
